## Summary

What does this pull request change?

## User-facing behavior

What will users notice after this change?

## Safety and privacy checklist

- [ ] I did not commit API keys, bearer tokens, `.env` files, local histories, generated private exports, or screenshots containing credentials.
- [ ] I reviewed any changes involving localStorage, provider settings, model calls, tool access, or exported Markdown.
- [ ] I updated documentation when changing public routes, configuration, roles, templates, or deployment behavior.

## Validation

- [ ] `bash scripts/check.sh`
- [ ] Manual browser check, if UI changed

## Notes for maintainers

Anything that needs special review?
